description.unified: Deals Magic DMG 3 time to a random enemy and nearby enemies, and stuns them for 1.8sec.
Creates [Belladonna Seed] in the area around the target for 7sec. [Belladonna Seed]: Deals Magic DMG to nearby enemies every 1sec and reduces [healing received->Healing Rate] by 25% for 1sec.
Deals Magic DMG 6 time to enemies in a wide frontal area and knocks them down for [1.8 sec->1sec].

On Normal and Skill Attacks, inflicts [Poison] on the target, dealing Magic DoT equal to 100% ATK every 1sec for 20sec and reducing [healing received->Healing Rate] by [5%->1%]. This effect stacks up to [5 times->25 times].

dark.unified: Enemies hit suffer increased status ailment duration by [30%->20%] for 5 sec.

light.unified: Mana cost increases by 1000, but damage increases by [80%->100%].
For each [Poison] stack, the target's Attack is reduced by [5%->1%].

dark.unified: If the target is a boss, [Poison] damage increases by [70%->100%].
